coverage_notes: This file is structured for app completeness. Fault codes are mapped at family level using official support/manufacturer manuals where publicly available. PCB and certain spare-part numbers are intentionally left as VERIFY fields unless a model-specific match is securely confirmed from the exact sticker / E-Nr / revision. This avoids wrong-board ordering on region or revision variants.

models.service_notes: Use full model sticker, production index, and PCB/software revision before ordering parts. Family-level faults below are broadly applicable; code map may vary slightly by market and chassis. Exact board and lock numbers remain sticker-sensitive; use a photo of the existing PCB label before purchase.

service_identity.sticker_location_hint: Check inner door frame or rear rating plate depending on OEM chassis.
service_identity.parts_ordering_rule: Vestel platforms often share cabinets but differ in software and wiring; confirm chassis and sticker first.

faults.title: Door lock error
faults.description: Door lock does not confirm safe closed position.

boards.name: Main control PCB
boards.notes: Exact PCB depends on full model code, revision, option set, heater/steam/Wi-Fi support, and region.

boards.name: Display / UI PCB
boards.notes: Button map and fascia window must match exact panel.

boards.name: Power board / noise filter area
boards.notes: Some families integrate power stage on main PCB; others separate it.

boards.name: Main PCB
boards.notes: Vestel-produced platforms vary by board software and option pack.

boards.name: Display PCB
boards.notes: Match key legend and display type.

parts.part_name: Drain pump filter cap / clean-out set
parts.notes: Match filter housing diameter and thread style.
Confirm hose route and diameter.
Match tub lip and front panel clamp style.
Confirm wattage, NTC position, and flange style.
Match resistance curve and connector.
Only for belt-drive families; not used on direct-drive models.
Length and damping force depend on drum size.
Connector and latch profile must match exact cabinet.
Single / dual / triple feed varies by dispenser design.
Confirm Askoll/Copreci style and connector.
Lock body and tongue style differ by platform.
Check number of solenoids.

documents.title: Service reference
documents.notes: Attach the exact PDF/manual for this precise model or sticker version when available.

documents.title: Wiring diagram reference
documents.notes: Attach scanned sheet or cloud link for this exact model/revision.

documents.title: Exploded parts view
documents.notes: Attach or link model-specific parts diagram when available.

documents.title: Technical sheet / test mode
documents.notes: Add service mode steps and resistance values if available for this exact family.

documents.title: Exact parts lookup source
documents.notes: Store the vendor or official parts lookup URL used for final board/part confirmation.

images.title: Board photo
images.notes: Paste image link or local asset for main PCB.

images.title: Model sticker
images.notes: Add sticker photo to lock correct spare parts.

images.title: Wiring diagram
images.notes: Attach exact diagram scan or hosted image when available.

images.title: Control panel photo
images.notes: Add front fascia photo for exact UI board matching.

images.title: Rear / internal board layout
images.notes: Add internal chassis or PCB mounting photo when available.

images.notes: Attach family-specific code chart image if available.

Family-level faults below are broadly applicable; code map may vary slightly by market and chassis. Exact board and lock numbers remain sticker-sensitive; use a photo of the existing PCB label before purchase.

service_identity.sticker_location_hint: Check inner door frame or rear rating plate depending on OEM chassis.
service_identity.parts_ordering_rule: Vestel platforms often share cabinets but differ in software and wiring; confirm chassis and sticker first.

faults.title: Door lock error
faults.description: Door lock does not confirm safe closed position.

boards.name: Main control PCB
boards.notes: Exact PCB depends on full model code, revision, option set, heater/steam/Wi-Fi support, and region.

boards.name: Display / UI PCB
boards.notes: Button map and fascia window must match exact panel.

boards.name: Power board / noise filter area
boards.notes: Some families integrate power stage on main PCB; others separate it.

boards.name: Main PCB
boards.notes: Vestel-produced platforms vary by board software and option pack.

boards.name: Display PCB
boards.notes: Match key legend and display type.

parts.part_name: Drain pump filter cap / clean-out set
parts.notes: Match filter housing diameter and thread style.
Confirm hose route and diameter.
Match tub lip and front panel clamp style.
Confirm wattage, NTC position, and flange style.
Match resistance curve and connector.
Only for belt-drive families; not used on direct-drive models.
Length and damping force depend on drum size.
Connector and latch profile must match exact cabinet.
Single / dual / triple feed varies by dispenser design.
Confirm Askoll/Copreci style and connector.
Lock body and tongue style differ by platform.
Check number of solenoids.
